problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: If Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site is applied to it, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
